description: Validates vehicle odometer readings ingested from telemetry, enforcing minimum trip distance thresholds, detecting negative distance anomalies, and flagging unexpected odometer jumps.

actors.name: System
actors.description: Validates odometer values at trip close and flags anomalies

actors.name: Vehicle API
actors.description: Source of raw odometer readings in the API native unit

convert_at_ingestion.description: Odometer values from the vehicle API are converted to kilometres at ingestion using a fixed conversion factor; the raw value is preserved for audit

minimum_trip_distance.description: A trip with distance < 0.01 km (10 metres) is discarded; the raw value is preserved for audit

negative_distance_discard.description: A trip with negative distance (end odometer less than start) is discarded — can occur due to sensor glitches, API errors, or data gaps

minimum_position_count.description: A trip with fewer than 2 recorded position readings is discarded regardless of calculated distance

jump_flagged_not_corrected.description: An odometer jump is detected when a new reading exceeds the previous by more than the threshold — flagged for review but not automatically corrected

no_smoothing_applied.description: Odometer values are stored as-is from the API; no smoothing, interpolation, or backward correction is applied

positions_deleted_with_trip.description: When a trip is discarded all associated position readings are also deleted; no record is retained for sub-threshold trips

given: a new odometer reading arrives from the vehicle API
odometer_converted_and_stored.result: Odometer stored in canonical unit; ready for trip distance calculation

any: trip has fewer than 2 position readings

then.description: Remove the trip and all associated position readings

trip_discarded_below_threshold.result: Sub-threshold trip deleted; no record retained

then.description: Remove the trip and all associated position readings

trip_discarded_negative_distance.result: Trip with negative distance discarded; anomaly logged

given: new odometer reading exceeds previous reading by more than odometer_jump_threshold_km
odometer_jump_flagged.result: Large unexpected odometer increase flagged for review; reading stored as-is

errors.message: Trip did not meet minimum distance requirement and was not recorded.
Trip distance was negative, indicating a data error. Trip was discarded.
Unusually large odometer increase detected. Please review telemetry data.

events.name: odometer.trip.distance_valid
events.description: Trip distance passed validation and was retained

events.name: odometer.trip.discarded
events.description: Trip discarded for failing distance or position count threshold

events.name: odometer.anomaly.negative_distance
events.description: Trip ended with a lower odometer than it started — data anomaly

events.name: odometer.anomaly.jump_detected
events.description: Odometer reading jumped unexpectedly between consecutive readings
